case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. BENCHMARK SURVEYING, INC et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT BENCHMARK SURVEYING, INC SCOTTEN, DONN M. DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-17-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-02-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENCHMARK SURVEYING, INC
DECLARATION OF MARK SCHICKENDANTZ RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION - (IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT). FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENCHMARK SURVEYING, INC SCOTTEN, DONN M. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $15,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $16,569.56 DAMAGES, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $410.00 COSTS, $526.64 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,506.20, --AS TO ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
DECLARATION OF ANSON LOUIE RE: EVID CODE 1521, 1550 - COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585 - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $410.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BENCHMARK SURVEYING, INC SCOTTEN, DONN M.
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY RE: INTEREST CALCULATION - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTTEN, DONN M.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE
